errors.fellOffEdge: Oh no - you tried to fall off the edge of the maze!
errors.hitWall: Ouch - you walked into a wall!

checks.notReachedEnd: You didn't reach the end of the maze.
checks.wrongEmojis:
You didn't report the collected emojis correctly. We expected you to report:
{{expected}}
checks.reportedIncorrectly: You didn't report the collected emojis correctly.

collectEmojis.name: Collect emojis
collectEmojis.description: Navigate the maze, collecting emojis along the way, and announce your collection when you reach the finish.

randomEmojis.name: Random emojis
randomEmojis.description: Handle mazes with random emojis that change each time!

faces.name: Two types of emojis!
faces.description: Collect two types of emojis this time!

poo.name: Watch out!
poo.description: Collect the animals - not their waste!

onlyOnce.name: Only once!
onlyOnce.description: Make sure you only collect things once!

seeCurrentSquare.question: How do I see what is on the square I am standing on?
seeCurrentSquare.answer: Use the new direction: `look("down")`. It returns the emoji on your current square, which is the one you might want to pick up.

specialEmojisToIgnore.question: Which special emojis should I ignore?
specialEmojisToIgnore.answer: Skip anything in the standard list: `"star"`, `"flag"`, `"white square"`, `"fire"`, `"poop"`, `"brick"`. Any other emoji is fair game to collect.

countingWithDictionary.question: How do I count emojis using a dictionary?
countingWithDictionary.answer: Use `hasKey(dict, emoji)` to see if you have seen it before. If yes, add `1` to `dict[emoji]`. If no, set `dict[emoji] = 1` to start the count.

avoidRecounting.question: How do I stop picking up the same emoji every time I step on it?
avoidRecounting.answer: Call `removeEmoji()` straight after counting it. The square becomes empty so it will not be counted again on a future pass.

reachingFlag.question: What do I do once I reach the flag?
reachingFlag.answer: Call `announceEmojis(result)` with your dictionary as the argument. Do this once, after you have moved onto the finishing square.

move.description: Moves the character **one step forward** in the current direction. The character will only move if the target position is not blocked by a wall.

turnLeft.description: Turns the character **90 degrees to the left** (counterclockwise). This changes the direction the character is facing.

turnRight.description: Turns the character **90 degrees to the right** (clockwise). This changes the direction the character is facing.

look.description: Returns the **emoji** in the given direction. Use `"ahead"`, `"left"`, or `"right"` to look around, or `"down"` to see the current square.

removeEmoji.description: Removes the emoji from the **current square**. Use this after collecting an emoji to avoid counting it again.

announceEmojis.description: Announces your collected emojis. Pass a **dictionary** where keys are emoji strings and values are counts.
